access.deny_message: This account can only run approved preset bridge tasks.

notes: Text is transported as UTF-8 plain text.
Incoming image/file/audio/video resources are downloaded to local artifact paths when lark-cli can access the message resource.
Codex jobs run through the local codex CLI and keep session files under the local CODEX_HOME.

review-update.description: Update or prepare review-tracking content in Feishu documents from a meeting note, doc, or user-provided review request.
review-update.output_expectations: Return what was found, what was updated, and any missing information. If the input is not enough to update safely, ask for the specific missing URL or field.

codex_guardrails: Use the current lark-cli configuration and existing app/user authorization.
Do not add Open Platform permissions, request new scopes, publish app versions, or change event subscriptions unless the user explicitly asks for that administrative change.
Bridge replies must use lark-cli --as bot.
For exact formatting or Chinese text, send plain UTF-8 text instead of markdown conversion unless rich rendering is explicitly needed.
If the task requires a capability that is not available under the current app policy, report the limitation instead of attempting an authorization workaround.
